# rtk-spinner

A component which shows an animating spinner.

## Properties

| Property | Type     | Required | Default         | Description |
| -------- | -------- | -------- | --------------- | ----------- |
| iconPack | IconPack | ❌        | defaultIconPack | Icon pack   |
| size     | Size1    | ✅        | \-              | Size        |

## Usage Examples

### Basic Usage

```

<rtk-spinner></rtk-spinner>


```

### With Properties

```

<rtk-spinner

 size="md">

</rtk-spinner>


```

```

<script>

  const el = document.querySelector("rtk-spinner");


</script>


```
